name: paper-swiper
description: Tinder-style triage tool for conference papers (ICRA, CVPR, CoRL, RSS, ...)

scripts.build:web: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,green "node --env-file=.env.local server/index.mjs" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:web && npm run scrape
